name: Gomasio (Japanese Spice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Goma is the Japanese name for sesame. This mixture is used as a condiment to sprinkle on rice, raw vegetables, and salads. It is also good on boiled potatoes.
2. Lightly roast the sesame seeds in a dry frying pan over medium heat for about 1 minute, stirring frequently.
3. Allow the seeds to cool completely.
4. Grind the cooled sesame seeds together with the salt until well combined.
5. Store the blend in an airtight jar; it will keep for 3-4 months.
